exploration_notes: Searched for Go files under `dynamic/` in the `sg-evals/kubernetes-client-go` repo that import exactly `"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"` (not sub-packages like `runtime/schema`). Used both local ripgrep on the cloned repo and Sourcegraph keyword search. Both sources agree on these 9 files. Other files in the `dynamic/` tree (e.g., `interface.go`, `simple.go`, `lister.go`, `dynamicinformer/interface.go`) only import sub-packages like `pkg/runtime/schema` and are excluded.
